ip_outcome_note: Card explicitly names the species 'Purrloin' in its title/header and the PokemonTCG.io API returns evolvesTo: ['Liepard'] with nationalPokedexNumbers: [509]. Internal Pokemon-original species, not an external-IP crossover risk, so no separate IP callout block required; ip_verified flipped to true and confidence stays high.

trivia_bullets.text: Sword & Shield: Darkness Ablaze (SWSH3) is the third main expansion of the Sword & Shield series, released 2020-08-14 (English) and centered on Generation 8 Galar-region Pokemon including Charizard VMAX as the chase card; the set features 201 cards (printed total 189). [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3 set object; Bulbapedia: Darkness Ablaze (TCG), via WebSearch snippet]

Illustrator is sowsow (born 1988), known for environmental-storytelling Pokemon art that depicts species mid-scene 'in their own unique environments' — debuted with Avalugg, Inkay, and Cubone in Sun & Moon Forbidden Light, and has illustrated approximately 150 TCG cards including the high-value Gengar VMAX Alt Art and Espeon V Alt Art. [Art of Pokemon: sowsow page, via WebSearch snippet; Bleeding Cool artist spotlight, via WebSearch snippet]

Flavor text on card: "It steals things from people just to amuse itself with their frustration. A rivalry exists between this Pokemon and Nickit." The Nickit rivalry is a Galar-specific framing — both are Dark-type theft-archetype species and Nickit is the Galar-native counterpart (Galar Pokedex no. 29) to Purrloin (Galar Pokedex no. 44, National Pokedex no. 509). [PokemonTCG.io API flavorText field; Pokemondex / Serebii Galar Pokedex, via WebSearch snippet]

Purrloin (National Pokedex no. 509) is a Dark-type Generation V Pokemon that evolves into Liepard starting at level 20; community design analysis on Bulbapedia frames both as cat-burglar archetypes, with Purrloin drawing on tuxedo-cat patterning and Liepard pulling from leopards, ocelots, servals, and Savannah cats. [Bulbapedia: Purrloin (Pokemon), via WebSearch snippet; Bulbapedia: Liepard (Pokemon), via WebSearch snippet]

Card is a Basic Darkness-type with 70 HP, Grass weakness x2, 1 Colorless retreat cost, regulation mark D; legal in Unlimited and Expanded. Attacks: Dig Claws (1 Darkness for 10) and Fake Out (2 Colorless for 20, coin-flip Paralysis). Current TCGplayer market price for normal print is around $0.08 (reverse holo around $0.25), confirming common-bulk status. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-106 legalities, attacks, tcgplayer prices]
